rejection_reason: tone: forbidden_word — 'synergy' and 'cutting-edge' appear in body. Both are banned as meaningless filler language. Replace with concrete, specific descriptions.
text:
Subject: Creating synergy between your teams, {{first_name}}

Hi {{first_name}},

FlowAI creates powerful synergy between your sales, marketing, and operations teams through cutting-edge AI technology.

The synergy we create results in cutting-edge workflows that scale with your business.

Let's set up time to explore the synergy we could create at {{company}}.
